subcodes.first_line: The leaves of the sacred Lote-Tree must, with perfect certitude and assurance, hold fast unto the root of the Tree, lest the blowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اوراق سدره مبارکه باید بکمال ایقان و اطمینان باصل شجره متمسک باشند تا از هبوب
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
